grant_title: Frances L. & Edwin L. Cummings Memorial Fund Grants Awarded in 2024
geographic_restrictions: Primarily New York City, with some grants in New Jersey
project_area: Education, Health Care, and Social Welfare
demographic_requirements: Focus on underserved and low-income communities, including Black and Latinx youth, students with disabilities, English Language Learners, and individuals impacted by the criminal justice system
eligibility_summary: Nonprofit organizations, public charter schools, and community-based organizations operating in New York City and New Jersey that provide educational, healthcare, or social welfare services to underserved populations are eligible. Priority is given to programs addressing learning gaps, mental health, college readiness, career pathways, and systemic inequities.
